revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data U.S. Virgin Islands]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data U.S. Virgin Islands]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = United States Virgin Islands | shortname alias = U.S. Virgin Islands | flag alias = Flag of the United States Virgin Islands.svg | link alias-football = United States Virgin Islands {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} soccer team | name alias-basketball = Virgin Islands | link alias-basketball = Virgin Islands {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-cricket = United States Virgin Islands national cricket team | link alias-softball = United States Virgin Islands {{{mw|}}} {{{age|}}} national softball team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | redir1 = VIR | redir2 = ISV | redir3 = Virgin Islands, American | redir4 = Virgin Islands, U.S. | related1 = United States | related2 = British Virgin Islands </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_U.S._Virgin_Islands here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_U.S._Virgin_Islands for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = United States Virgin Islands | shortname alias = U.S. Virgin Islands | flag alias = Flag of the United States Virgin Islands.svg | link alias-football = United States Virgin Islands {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} soccer team | name alias-basketball = Virgin Islands | link alias-basketball = Virgin Islands {{{mw|}}} national {{{age|}}} basketball team | link alias-cricket = United States Virgin Islands national cricket team | link alias-softball = United States Virgin Islands {{{mw|}}} {{{age|}}} national softball team | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | redir1 = VIR | redir2 = ISV | redir3 = Virgin Islands, American | redir4 = Virgin Islands, U.S. | related1 = United States | related2 = British Virgin Islands </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
